description_long: This object is a rectangular stone block with slightly rounded edges and corners, giving it a softened, modern appearance. The surface is smooth with a matte finish, displaying a uniform light brown coloration reminiscent of sandstone or lightly stained concrete. There are subtle natural variations in the color and faint grain patterns, suggesting it is either a natural stone or a high-quality cast stone. The block is solid and monolithic, with no visible seams, joints, or decorative features. Its proportions are tall and narrow, making it suitable as a barrier or obstacle in urban environments such as sidewalks, plazas, or parks. The overall look is clean and contemporary, with no visible signs of heavy weathering or markings.
description: A tall, rectangular stone block with rounded edges, smooth matte surface, and a uniform light brown color, resembling sandstone or concrete.
description_view_0: Front view shows a flat, featureless face with subtle color variations and rounded vertical edges.
description_view_1: Side view is nearly identical to the front, with similar smoothness and coloration, but a faint spot is visible.
description_view_2: Back view maintains the same smooth, matte surface and coloration as the front, with no distinguishing marks.
description_view_3: Opposite side view is also featureless and smooth, with consistent color and texture throughout.
attribute_location_context: urban sidewalk or plaza as a protective barrier or seating element
attribute_installation_method: set in concrete or on a prepared foundation
attribute_weathering_pattern: No visible weathering; surface appears clean and well-maintained with minimal discoloration.
